seoTitle: Speers Point vs Speewa — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Speers Point and Speewa. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Speers Point vs Speewa: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Speers Point and Speewa.
heading: Speers Point vs Speewa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Speers Point, New South Wales and Speewa, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Speewa has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Speers Point (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Speers Point or Speewa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Speers Point has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Speewa scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Speers Point scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Speewa scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Speers Point or Speewa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Speewa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
